about us

Discover the World with Visit Abroad Travels.

Visit Abroad Travels, established in 2015, offers top-notch travel packages across Nepal, South Asia, and the world. We prioritize customer satisfaction, providing all-inclusive services that cover food, lodging, transportation, and guides. Our experienced team ensures a seamless journey, allowing you to explore diverse destinations and create unforgettable memories.

Our Testimonial

Explore top destinations with peak climbing, trekking, and exciting day trips.

"Visit Abroad Travels made our trek to Everest Base Camp unforgettable. The guides were knowledgeable and the services exceptional. We felt safe and well-cared for throughout the journey."

-Sarah Johnson

Everest Base Camp

"Our wildlife safari in Chitwan National Park was a thrilling adventure. The team ensured we saw everything we hoped for and more. Highly recommend their services!"

-Michael Lee

Chitwan National Park

"Exploring the cultural heritage of Kathmandu Valley with Visit Abroad Travels was an enriching experience. Their attention to detail and personalized approach made our trip truly special."

-Emma Davis

Kathmandu Valley

"Annapurna Circuit trek with Visit Abroad Travels was incredible. The scenery was breathtaking, and the support from the team made it a smooth and enjoyable experience."

-John Smith

Annapurna Circuit

Discover Perfect Travel Adventure Your Today

Explore our diverse range of travel packages designed to suit every need. For personalized assistance, contact us directly via phone or simply fill out our online form, and our travel experts will help you plan your perfect getaway

Contact Us
1. What types of travel packages do you offer?

We offer a variety of travel packages, including trekking, mountaineering, wildlife safaris, adventure activities, cultural heritage tours, and more. Our packages cover destinations in Nepal, South Asia, and worldwide.

2. Are your travel packages all-inclusive?

Yes, our travel packages are all-inclusive. They cover food, lodging, transportation, and guides to ensure a hassle-free and enjoyable travel experience.

3. How can I book a travel package with Visit Abroad Travels?

You can book a travel package by visiting our website, contacting us via email, or calling our customer service. Our team will assist you with the booking process and provide any additional information you need.

4. What is your cancellation policy?

Our cancellation policy varies depending on the specific travel package. Please refer to the terms and conditions provided with your booking confirmation or contact our customer service for detailed information

5. Do you offer customized travel packages?

Yes, we offer customized travel packages to suit your specific preferences and needs. Contact us with your requirements, and we will tailor a package just for you.

6. What safety measures do you have in place?

We prioritize the safety of our clients by providing experienced guides, reliable transportation, and ensuring compliance with local safety regulations. We also offer travel insurance options for added peace of mind.

7. Can I book a travel package for a group?

Absolutely! We offer travel packages for individuals, families, and groups. Contact us with the details of your group, and we will arrange a suitable package.

8. What should I pack for my trip?

Packing recommendations vary depending on the destination and type of travel package. We provide a detailed packing list for each package to ensure you have everything you need for your trip.

9. Do you offer travel insurance?

Yes, we offer travel insurance options to cover various aspects of your trip, including medical emergencies, trip cancellations, and lost luggage. We highly recommend purchasing travel insurance for added protection.

10. How do I get in touch with customer support?

You can reach our customer support team via email, phone, or through our website's contact form. We are available to assist you with any questions or concerns you may have.

Frequently Asked Questions.

Still do you have any questions to know?Feel free to ask our experts.

Explore the world with Visit Abroad Travels. Exceptional all-inclusive packages tailored for unforgettable experiences. Please contact us via phone or email.
